changed.previous: "Thou thyself, Bhishma, Karna, Kripa, the victorious in war, Asvatthama, Vikarna, and Bhurisrava, the son of Somadatta—all these are ready for battle."
changed.next: You yourself, Bhishma, Karna, Kripa, the victorious in war, Asvatthama, Vikarna, and Bhurisrava, the son of Somadatta—all these are ready for battle.

changed.previous: Arjuna said, "O Krishna, seeing my kinsmen arrayed here, eager to fight,"
changed.next: Arjuna said, "O Krishna, I see my kinsmen arrayed here, eager to fight."

changed.previous: Though they, with intelligence overpowered by greed, see no evil in the destruction of families and no sin in hostility to friends,
changed.next: They, with intelligence overpowered by greed, see no evil in the destruction of families and no sin in hostility to friends.

changed.previous: I do nothing at all," thus would the harmonized knower of Truth think, seeing, hearing, touching, smelling, eating, going, sleeping, and breathing."
changed.next: "I do nothing at all," thus would the harmonized knower of Truth think, seeing, hearing, touching, smelling, eating, going, sleeping, and breathing.
